result.summary: Harness exposes a large authenticated REST API, a first-party `hc` CLI, and a first-party MCP server; all developer-facing surfaces use Harness-issued API tokens.
result.description: Harness is a software delivery platform for CI/CD, GitOps, feature management, internal developer portals, security, and related DevOps workflows. It provides hosted platform services and supporting developer tooling for automating and managing those resources.

harness_api_token.label: Harness API token (personal or service account token tied to an API key)
harness_api_token.setup: Create an API key and then a token in Harness. For a personal token: go to your user profile in Harness, under **My API Keys** choose **API Key**, save it, then choose **Token** under that key and create a token. For service-account credentials, create a service account and its API key/token in Harness. See [Manage API keys](https://developer.harness.io/docs/platform/automation/api/add-and-manage-api-keys) and [Get started with Harness API](https://developer.harness.io/docs/platform/automation/api/api-quickstart).
